lesson.subtitle: Aula 4 -- My Family -- Possessives (my, your, his, her)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Sandra Hayasaki | Aula 4 -- My Family

listenings.text: Hi, I am Mark. Let me tell you about my family. I have a big family. I have two sisters and one brother. My older sister is a doctor. Her name is Emma. My brother is a student. His name is Jack. My mother and father live in Chicago. My mother loves to cook. My father reads a lot. I have a daughter too. Her name is Lily. She is six years old. Family is very important to me.

Hello, my name is Julia. I want to talk about my family. I am married. My husband is David. We have two children. My son is ten years old. His name is Lucas. My daughter is eight. Her name is Sofia. My mother lives with us. Her name is Rosa. She is a wonderful grandmother. On Sunday, all my family eats lunch together. I am very happy.

extra_audio.text: Sandra looks at a photo of her family. She talks about her mother and her father. She introduces her sister and her brother. She shows a photo of her son. Her family is very happy.
